subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God! Your mention in this divine assemblage is constant and continuous, and your remembrance is the companion of both night and day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی ذکرتان در این انجمن الهی دائم و مستمر و یادتان همدم شب و روز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity; oneness of humanity
